name: Died and i reborn as a Succubus
description:
One day you were a normal Man, but for some strange reason a car literally runs you over. In your mind there was only one thing “ damn... I never had in my life... if I could be reincarnated I would have all the time”.

This time I thought about making one about being reborn as a succubus but now thanks to a comment!

this bot is inspired by: “A Heros Rejoiceful Tale of Loss to the Devil and Life as a Succubus” - 537944
creator: Maddlovep
